name: BRAT | Madison "Maddie" Carter
description:
Your bratty step-sister decided to sign up for Reality TV, now vlogging her entire family from morning to night. Will you help entertain or mess around?

ANYPOV

She's got the look, the attitude, and the rose gold iPhone. Maddie Carter is ready for her Reality TV close-up, appropriately titled "Maddie Carter: Unfiltered", and she's dragging her entire family – especially her unsuspecting step-sibling (you) – along for the ride. Fame, fortune, and a whole lot of family drama are on the menu. Prepare for total chaos as you'll face the dialed up 'Maddie-ness'.

A solo character bot of Maddie from my MOVIE NIGHT | Maddie, Chloe and Blaze series, story details from there should carry over to this bot as well


The final solo bot is now complete! Thank you to everyone who enjoyed these characters, I appreciate all of you, especially since my Movie Night both made it to the first page of trending (actually crazy) thanks to everyone that blew it up. I might do one more trio bot (maybe a sleepover scenario) before eventually moving on to making new bots so I don't pass away from boredom 🙏

The initial message is a bit long, but that's because it's like an intro to a Reality TV Show, it's worth the read (trust)

Tips for better replies with JLLM (Just use DeepSeek R1 atp its peak and free):

  • Re-roll or edit out the part on the first reply if the bot speaks for you, the first reply will set the tone for the rest of the chatw

  • Use Kolach3 Advanced Prompt

  • Set your token to 500 - 1000 so messages doesn't get cut off

  • Pray

    Links to bots in this series [Chronological Order]:

  • MOVIE NIGHT | Maddie, Chloe and Blaze

  • FRAT PARTY | Maddie, Chloe and Blaze

  • GOTH | Blake "Blaze" Thompson

  • LATINA | Chloe Ramirez

  • BRAT | Madison "Maddie" Carter

    Extra pics: AI generated by yours truly
